zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Paveley於大約1360年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，她的父親John de Paveley47歲，母親Agnes de la Mare44歲。她與Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴布卡利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Paveley于大约1360年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，她的父亲John de Paveley47岁，母亲Agnes de la Mare44岁。她与Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.在英国英格兰薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴布卡利。

nameMeanings.name: Paveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pavelin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Paveley ( see Pawley ) with an excrescent -n.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Paveley was born about 1360, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Paveley, was 47 and her mother, Agnes de la Mare, was 44. She married Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died after 1412, in Babcary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Beckington, Newton, Somerset, England: Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Paveley est née environ 1360, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Paveley, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Agnes de la Mare, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John d’Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. à Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1412, à Babcary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Beckington, Newton, Somerset, England: Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Paveley um 1360 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Paveley 47 und ihre Mutter Agnes de la Mare 44. Sie hat in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1412 in Babcary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Paveley è nata il circa 1360 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Paveley, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Agnes de la Mare, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. nel Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1412, nel Babcary, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Paveleyが約1360年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Paveleyは47歳，母Agnes de la Mareは44歳であった。イギリスイギリスソメルセトベクイントン ウィス スタンデルウィックでSir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバブカーイで死去した。

ko.Beckington, Newton, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Paveley(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Paveley(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de la Mare(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에서 Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바브카리에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. em Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Beckington, Newton, Somerset, England: беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Paveley родилась около 1360 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Paveley было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de la Mare, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1412 г. в местности бабкэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir John de Erleigh of Beckington, VII, Knight, Esq. en Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
